description_long: This object is a rectangular outdoor tennis court set within a low, dark-colored base, surrounded by a scattering of stylized green trees and shrubbery. The court surface is a muted green with clearly defined white boundary lines, including baselines, sidelines, service boxes, and a central net. A mesh fence structure is visible at one end of the court, likely serving as a backstop, while the rest of the perimeter is open. The trees are evenly distributed around the court, suggesting a landscaped park or recreational area. The overall design is clean and modern, with a focus on functional sports space and minimalistic landscaping.
description: A rectangular green tennis court with white markings, surrounded by stylized green trees and a partial mesh fence at one end. The court sits on a dark base, evoking a landscaped recreational area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tennis court with the mesh fence structure at the far end and trees distributed around the perimeter.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the court, the mesh fence on the left, and the arrangement of trees along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view with the mesh fence in the foreground and a clear view of the court's markings and surrounding trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the court's width, the mesh fence on the right, and the trees along the edge.
attribute_net_type: Braided synthetic mesh net, likely nylon, black color, supported by two metal posts with visible tensioning mechanism.
attribute_court_line_markings: All standard tennis court lines present, white color, medium width, complete and clearly visible.
attribute_surrounding_fence: Partial perimeter mesh fence, likely metal, gray color, medium height, located at one end of the court.
